visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) [People: Face/Hands] A woman with long, dark hair wearing a white sleeveless tank top speaks directly to the camera in a bathroom. She uses her hands to gesture towards her hair and face. [Objects: Details/State] A white towel hangs in the background. [Setting: Background/Lighting] Brightly lit indoor bathroom with beige tiled walls. (2) [People: Face/Hands] A rapid sequence shows a woman sleeping on white pillows, followed by close-ups of hands holding clumps of loose dark hair. [Objects: Details/State] A white plate containing golden-brown fried nuggets and French fries with dipping sauces. (3) [People: Face/Hands] The woman returns, holding a black paddle hairbrush. A meme graphic of a black and white cat giving a thumbs-up appears over the scene. (4) [People: Face/Hands] She demonstrates brushing her hair from the roots. She then holds up a dark green translucent bottle of hair scalp liquid and applies it to her scalp, massaging it with her fingers. [Objects: Details/State] A green bottle labeled AROMASE 5α JUNIPER. (5) [People: Face/Hands] The woman appears in pink patterned pajamas with a white towel wrapped around her head and a face mask on her face. She uses a hair dryer to blow-dry her hair. (6) [People: Face/Hands] She holds up a green spray bottle and then a yellow translucent bottle of hair oil. She applies the oil to the ends of her hair and smooths it down. [Objects: Details/State] Bottles of AROMASE and Elujuda products. (7) [People: Face/Hands] She smiles and waves at the camera as a pink graphic overlay appears. [Setting: Background/Lighting] The background remains the tiled bathroom setting.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 今天想跟大家分享一下... [Logo]: @hanhantalks. (2) [Slogan]: 頭皮養護小撇步 1: 梳頭. (3) [Slogan]: 頭皮養護小撇步 2: 淨化液. (4) [Slogan]: 頭皮養護小撇步 3: 分區清洗. (5) [Slogan]: 頭皮養護小撇步 4: 精華液. (6) [Slogan]: 頭皮養護小撇步 4: 髮油. (7) [Variety]: 完成.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator presenting the tutorial.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A woman in her late 20s or early 30s with long dark hair, initially wearing a white tank top and later pink patterned pajamas with a face mask.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, modern bathroom with large beige wall tiles and a white towel hanging on a rack.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A friendly female voice begins the tutorial with a lively, high-arousal tone. Light acoustic guitar BGM plays consistently in the background at a moderate tempo. (2) Vocal delivery continues as she shares a personal story, maintaining clear articulation and a steady pace. (3) A digital 'pop' sound effect triggers when a cat meme appears visually. (4) The speaker transitions into instructional mode, explaining each step with rising intonation for clarity. (5) The constant hum of a hair dryer briefly overlaps the background music while she describes the drying process. (6) The narration concludes with a warm, positive valence, finishing with a final encouraging phrase as the BGM fades out.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Problem (Hair Loss) -> Step-by-Step Solution -> Result.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a structured hair care routine and promote specific scalp and hair maintenance products (AROMASE and Elujuda) through a personal, relatable tutorial format.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator holds the products directly to the camera, names the brands, and demonstrates their specific usage steps.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video effectively combines personal storytelling with a practical tutorial, using product placement to drive commercial appeal.
